hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your input" with title "Untamed Pursuit"'

FLAG_COUNT=$(grep -r '<!-- FLAG:' books/book-*/chapters/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$FLAG_COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then echo "$FLAG_COUNT unresolved <!-- FLAG: --> comments remain in chapter files"; fi
